column1: # text = Mahaj Brown, 6, \"riddled with bullets,\" survives Philadelphia shooting Police say a 6-year-old boy has been shot in Philadelphia, marking the second shooting of a 6-year-old in the city this week.
# text = The child's grandparents identified him to CBS Philadelphia as Mahaj Brown.
# text = The grandparents say Brown suffered multiple gunshot wounds, including in his groin, leg, arm and abdomen, but was awake when he was transported to the hospital.
# text = "He just took a lot, his little body was riddled with bullets," his grandmother Delores Melendez tells the station.
# text = I just can't believe it.
# text = The boy is listed in critical condition at a hospital and has undergone several surgeries.
# text = Family tells the station he is expected to recover.
# text = He was set to start first grade at a local elementary school.
# text = Brown was among four people shot in the Germantown section.
# text = Also shot were three men: two 29-year-olds and one 32-year old.
# text = One of the 29-year-old men was reported in critical condition; the other two victims were listed in stable condition, according to CBS Philadelphia.
# text = The child was found shot in the front seat of a car along with the 29-year-old in critical condition, the station reports.
# text = The other two victims were not in the car and police are investigating whether any of the wounded men could be a shooter.
# text = Investigators tells CBS Philadelphia it appears there was crossfire between multiple gunmen.
# text = Assault weapon-style shell casings, traced to different assault style weapons, littered the scene.
# text = It appears that this was definitely an ongoing battle.
# text = There were casings in the street, on both sides of the sidewalk.
# text = So it appears that there were multiple armed combatants out here and that they were actively engaged,\" Philadelphia police Captain Anthony Ginaldi told the station.
# text = Multiple houses and vehicles in the area were also struck.
# text = No arrests have been made and police are reportedly reviewing surveillance video.
# text = Another 6-year-old, a girl, was hit in her arm by a stray bullet Tuesday while playing in front of her home in the West Oak Lane neighborhood.
# text = She is recovering, and police are still searching for a suspect.
